sp_widget.name: TraceNow Connections
sp_widget.template:
Connections

Manage your ServiceNow instance connections

Secure Connection Storage

Your connection credentials are encrypted and stored securely. You only need to configure them once.

{{::conn.name}}

{{::conn.status}}
{{::conn.url}}
{{::conn.username}}
{{::conn.lastUpdated}}

sys_update_version.name: sp_widget_cfdf3660c399031093c8b71d050131a6
sys_update_version.payload: custom -1) { // Slice it out of the array. AngularJS automatically updates the UI layout. c.data.connections.splice(index, 1); console.log("Safely purged cached workspace definition for: " + conn.name); } }; };]]>c.tn-connections-widget { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, sans-serif; color: #0f172a; .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 24px; .page-title { font-size: 26px; font-weight: 700; color: #0c63e7; margin: 0 0 4px 0; } .page-subtitle { color: #64748b; font-size: 14px; margin: 0; } .btn-primary { background: #0c63e7; color: white; border: none; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(12, 99, 231, 0.3); transition: all 0.2s ease; &:hover { background: #0a52c2; transform: translateY(-1px); } } } .security-banner { display: flex; align-items: center; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px 20px; margin-bottom: 30px; gap: 16px; .icon-circle { color: #0c63e7; font-size: 22px; display: flex; align-items: center; } .banner-text { strong { display: block; font-size: 14px; color: #0f172a; margin-bottom: 2px; } p { margin: 0; font-size: 13px; color: #64748b; } } } .connections-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 24px; .connection-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); transition: all 0.2s ease; /* Active Highlight Matching Image */ &.selected-card { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #eff6ff 0%, #e0eafc 100%); border-color: #bfdbfe; box-shadow: 0 10px 20px -5px rgba(12, 99, 231, 0.15); } .card-top { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 4px; .conn-name { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; color: #0c63e7; margin: 0; } .status-badge { padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; &.active-badge { background: #dbeafe; color: #0c63e7; } &.inactive-badge { background: #fee2e2; color: #ef4444; } } } .conn-url { font-size: 13px; color: #94a3b8; text-decoration: none; display: block; margin-bottom: 20px; &:hover { text-decoration: underline; color: #0c63e7;} } .conn-details { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 24px; .detail-group { label { display: block; font-size: 11px; color: #94a3b8; margin-bottom: 4px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px;} span { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #334155; } } .text-right { text-align: right; } } .card-actions { display: flex; gap: 12px; .btn-action { padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; border: none; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; transition: all 0.2s ease; } .btn-connect { background: #eff6ff; color: #0c63e7; } .btn-connect:hover { background: #dbeafe; } .btn-edit { background: #f1f5f9; color: #475569; } .btn-edit:hover { background: #e2e8f0; } .btn-delete { background: #fef2f2; color: #ef4444; } .btn-delete:hover { background: #fee2e2; } } } } }sp_instancefalsetracenow-connectionsfalseTraceNow Connectionsfalsefalsesp_widgetadmin2026-06-02 19:47:56cfdf3660c399031093c8b71d050131a60TraceNow Connections464e42acc3d1031093c8b71d050131c2464e42acc3d1031093c8b71d050131c2sp_widget_cfdf3660c399031093c8b71d050131a6admin2026-06-02 19:47:56
